'''''Indomitable''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruiser]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

Along with Strike cruisers [[Formidable (Strike-class)|''Formidable'']], [[Triumph (Strike-class)|''Triumph'']] and the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Grey Wolf]]'' it was to ambush a strike force, sent by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]], that was supposed to ambush a convoy of what was supposed to carry [[Missile Boat]]s, when in reality they carried munitions. The strike force was destroyed and the ships went into hyperspace. It was then an escort ship for [[Task Force Whirlwind]]. The Task Force was supposed to rendezvous with a convoy of Missile Boats that were used as bait to lure Zaarin's forces into a trap. However, Zaarin sent the [[Maelstrom (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Maelstrom'']] to destroy the Task force but they were repelled. However, they managed to stall the task force long enough to be hopelessly behind schedule.
